Class AlgorithmContext.Builder<G>

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.AlgorithmContext.Builder<G>
Enclosing class:
AlgorithmContext<G>
public static final class AlgorithmContext.Builder<G> extends Object
Builder to keep algorithm setup explicit and readable.
